allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''saves/Bastogne_tactical_80x92_2026-02-21.json'',''utf8''\); const d=JSON.parse\(j\); const terrains=new Set\(\); const features=new Set\(\); for\(const k in d.map.cells\){terrains.add\(d.map.cells[k].terrain\); \(d.map.cells[k].features||[]\).forEach\(f=>features.add\(f\)\);} console.log\(''Terrains:'',JSON.stringify\([...terrains].sort\(\)\)\); console.log\(''Features:'',JSON.stringify\([...features].sort\(\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const gs=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''saves/games/game_20260304193652.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''terrain:'', JSON.stringify\(gs.terrain?._ref\)\); console.log\(''has game.config.llm:'', !!gs.game?.config?.llm\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(gs\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const gs=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''saves/games/game_20260304193652.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''terrain ref:'', gs.terrain && gs.terrain._ref\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(gs\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const gs=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''saves/games/game_20260304193652.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''pendingOrders:'', JSON.stringify\(gs.pendingOrders\)\); console.log\(''has config.llm:'', gs.game.config && gs.game.config.llm ? ''yes'' : ''no''\); console.log\(''visibilityState:'', gs.visibilityState ? ''present'' : ''absent''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Ryan/Documents/open-conflict-v0.10/open-conflict/saves/Paris_0.1km_22x24_2026-03-06.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''Grid dims:'', d.grid?.length, ''x'', d.grid?.[0]?.length\); console.log\(''Fine grid dims:'', d.fineGrid?.length, ''x'', d.fineGrid?.[0]?.length\); console.log\(''Sample fine cell:'', JSON.stringify\(d.fineGrid?.[0]?.[0]\)\); console.log\(''Sample display cell:'', JSON.stringify\(d.grid?.[0]?.[0]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Ryan/Documents/open-conflict-v0.10/open-conflict/saves/Paris_0.1km_22x24_2026-03-06.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Top keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''map keys:'', d.map ? Object.keys\(d.map\) : ''no map''\); console.log\(''_meta:'', JSON.stringify\(d._meta\)\); if\(d.map\) { console.log\(''map.grid dims:'', d.map.grid?.length, ''x'', d.map.grid?.[0]?.length\); console.log\(''map.fineGrid dims:'', d.map.fineGrid?.length, ''x'', d.map.fineGrid?.[0]?.length\); console.log\(''Sample display cell keys:'', d.map.grid?.[0]?.[0] ? Object.keys\(d.map.grid[0][0]\) : ''N/A''\); console.log\(''Sample fine cell:'', JSON.stringify\(d.map.fineGrid?.[0]?.[0]\)?.substring\(0,200\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Ryan/Documents/open-conflict-v0.10/open-conflict/saves/Paris_0.1km_22x24_2026-03-06.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''map.cols:'', d.map.cols, ''map.rows:'', d.map.rows\); console.log\(''map.cells type:'', typeof d.map.cells, ''isArray:'', Array.isArray\(d.map.cells\), ''length:'', d.map.cells?.length\); console.log\(''fineGrid type:'', typeof d.fineGrid, ''isArray:'', Array.isArray\(d.fineGrid\)\); if\(Array.isArray\(d.fineGrid\)\) { console.log\(''fineGrid length:'', d.fineGrid.length\); console.log\(''fineGrid[0] type:'', typeof d.fineGrid[0], ''isArray:'', Array.isArray\(d.fineGrid[0]\)\); if\(Array.isArray\(d.fineGrid[0]\)\) { console.log\(''fineGrid[0] length:'', d.fineGrid[0].length\); console.log\(''fineGrid[0][0]:'', JSON.stringify\(d.fineGrid[0][0]\)?.substring\(0,300\)\); } } console.log\(''Sample display cell:'', JSON.stringify\(d.map.cells?.[0]\)?.substring\(0,500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Ryan/Documents/open-conflict-v0.10/open-conflict/saves/Paris_0.1km_22x24_2026-03-06.json'',''utf8''\)\); const cellKeys = Object.keys\(d.map.cells\); console.log\(''cells key count:'', cellKeys.length\); console.log\(''first 10 keys:'', cellKeys.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(''sample cell:'', JSON.stringify\(d.map.cells[cellKeys[0]]\)?.substring\(0,500\)\); const fgKeys = Object.keys\(d.fineGrid\); console.log\(''fineGrid key count:'', fgKeys.length\); console.log\(''first 10 fineGrid keys:'', fgKeys.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(''sample fineGrid entry:'', JSON.stringify\(d.fineGrid[fgKeys[0]]\)?.substring\(0,500\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/Ryan/Documents/open-conflict-v0.10/open-conflict/saves/Paris_0.1km_22x24_2026-03-06.json'',''utf8''\)\); const fg = d.fineGrid; console.log\(''fineGrid.cols:'', fg.cols\); console.log\(''fineGrid.rows:'', fg.rows\); console.log\(''fineGrid.cellSizeKm:'', fg.cellSizeKm\); const fgCells = fg.cells; console.log\(''fineGrid.cells type:'', typeof fgCells, ''isArray:'', Array.isArray\(fgCells\)\); const fgCellKeys = Object.keys\(fgCells\); console.log\(''fineGrid.cells key count:'', fgCellKeys.length\); console.log\(''first 10 fine cell keys:'', fgCellKeys.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\(''sample fine cell:'', JSON.stringify\(fgCells[fgCellKeys[0]]\)?.substring\(0,300\)\);")
